compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect shared sub-workflow architecture
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section, skill quick reference, and related documentation to reflect the new shared sub-workflow architecture
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the shared scrutiny pipeline, value/effort scorer, consolidated reviewer prompts, and scrutiny:pending gate
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md architecture and quick reference sections; update any skill documentation that references old reviewer prompt paths
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md architecture section describes the shared sub-workflow pattern and the scrutiny:pending gate
  ← Satisfies: docs reflect current architecture
- When this story is complete, no documentation references the old duplicate reviewer prompt paths
  ← Satisfies: docs are accurate

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Story complete: docs updated for shared sub-workflow architecture
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
